a lo-fi 2015s-era, diagonally taken, low-quality iPhone photo of a 20-year-old baddie. The shot is imperfect — grainy, off-center, motion-blurred, and raw. The lighting is uneven and yellowish, like a flash bounced off a mirror or cheap LED strip. She’s captured head-to-hip, wearing a cropped hoodie and low-rise jeans with a rhinestone belt and playfull tanga peeking, a tiny purse hanging off her shoulder. Her long hair partially covers her face as she moves mid-pose, expression unreadable.
